# ~~parseToolsListPayload()~~

> **Test Support Layer**

```ts
function parseToolsListPayload(payload: unknown): string[];
```

Defined in: [src/app/testing/utility/mcp-response.utility.ts:76](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/3d2831b148eaa4c84c57fa062fce6df920f72a50/src/app/testing/utility/mcp-response.utility.ts#L76)

Parses a `tools/list` JSON-RPC response and returns the tool names.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type      | Description                        |
| --------- | --------- | ---------------------------------- |
| `payload` | `unknown` | The raw JSON-RPC response payload. |

## Returns

`string`\[]

An array of registered tool name strings.

## Deprecated

No longer imported by any test.  Use
`StreamableHTTPClientTransport` with a `tools/list` request
instead.

## Remarks

Navigates `payload.result.tools` via [getObjectProperty](../../reflect.utility/functions/getObjectProperty.md).
Throws when the structure is invalid so tests fail explicitly.

## Throws

If `payload.result.tools` is not an array.
